name: io.github.stepankaiser/ccphoto
title: CCPhoto — Phone Camera Bridge
description: Bridge your phone camera to Claude Code. Take photos, stream live video, speak via voice, and receive rich generative UI — all over your local WiFi network. No app install needed.

environmentVariables.name: CCPHOTO_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Override the default photo storage directory (~/.ccphoto/captures/)
